parameters.query:
SELECT public.listmonk_record_external_unsubscribe(
  '{{ String($json.email || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.id || "" }}', '')::integer,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.uuid || "" }}', '')::uuid,
  'listmonk_unsubscribe_poll',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
) AS updated_count;

SELECT
  me.member_email_id::text AS member_email_id,
  me.email_normalized,
  COALESCE(me.mailing_subscription_status, '') AS mailing_subscription_status,
  me.mailing_unsubscribed_at,
  me.mailing_unsubscribe_source,
  me.listmonk_subscriber_id,
  me.listmonk_subscriber_uuid::text AS listmonk_subscriber_uuid
FROM public.member_emails me
WHERE
  lower(me.email_normalized) = lower('{{ String($json.email || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}')
  OR lower(me.email) = lower('{{ String($json.email || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}')
  OR me.listmonk_subscriber_id = NULLIF('{{ $json.id || "" }}', '')::integer
  OR me.listmonk_subscriber_uuid = NULLIF('{{ $json.uuid || "" }}', '')::uuid
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN me.listmonk_subscriber_id = NULLIF('{{ $json.id || "" }}', '')::integer THEN 0
    WHEN me.listmonk_subscriber_uuid = NULLIF('{{ $json.uuid || "" }}', '')::uuid THEN 1
    ELSE 2
  END,
  me.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 1;
